rationale: Direct-call recorder pattern (record_issue_snapshot/record_commit_event/record_test_run_event/record_skill_event) is the established idiom with 4 existing precedents; event-bus is scoped to FSM-loop/issue-lifecycle only with a hardcoded 2-family SQLiteTransport dispatch and would need new DES variant registration; backfill shape reused for out-of-band edit reconciliation but session-start wiring scoped as follow-on.
rule: Approach A (per-CLI event) + Approach B backfill shape (companion); Approach C (event-bus) rejected
alternatives_rejected: Approach C (event-bus emit); Approach B alone without Approach A
